repo.description: an implementation of Revisiting Adaptive Convolutions for Video Frame Interpolation using PyTorch

terms.context_snippet: This is a reference implementation of Revisiting Adaptive Convolutions for Video Frame Interpolation [1] using PyTorch. Given two frames, it will make use of [adaptive convolution](http://sniklaus.com/papers/adaconv) [2] in a [separable manner](http://sniklaus.com/papers/sepconv…
